evidence_quotes.quote: including making games I have already paid for entirely inaccessible by intentional actions on part of the Developer.
Products I have already paid for should not be designed to stop working at the whim of a profit driven corporation.
no warning or grace periods provided.

paragraphs.text: The video game industry has been implementing more and more aggressive anti-consumer measures, including making games I have already paid for entirely inaccessible by intentional actions on part of the Developer. This practice must be stopped. Products I have already paid for should not be designed to stop working at the whim of a profit driven corporation. Car manufacturers are not allowed to remotely break your car whenever they release a new model, and neither should the video game industry be. Its not a hypothetical, either, as the video game industry already have killed many games, with no warning or grace periods provided.
